game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Solo tú por aquí (Only you here)** Players navigate a first-person psychological horror adventure set within a dreamscape, using a virtual joystick on the left side of the screen for movement and swiping the right side to control camera rotation. The core mechanic involves exploring surreal environments, interacting with environmental objects via a single-tap action to uncover clues, solve contextual puzzles, and progress towards opening a specific "small door" to escape. Puzzles range from finding hidden keys to manipulating machinery, with each successful interaction revealing a piece of the fragmented narrative. Progression is driven by unlocking new areas after solving 1-3 interconnected puzzles per zone, leading to one of approximately 7 distinct narrative endings based on player choices and discovered secrets. The game concludes upon reaching any of the multiple endings, with the ultimate goal being to uncover the "main secret" by experiencing all possible narrative paths.
game_info.description: Navigate through a surreal dreamscape filled with mysterious puzzles and hidden secrets. Explore interconnected zones, interact with strange objects, and uncover fragments of a cryptic narrative. Your goal is to find keys, solve environmental puzzles, and unlock the small door that leads to escape. Each choice you make shapes your path toward one of multiple endings. Can you discover the main secret hidden within this twisted reality?
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right
Space: Interact with objects in front of you
Z: Toggle between walking and running speed
Enter: Start the game from the title screen
ESC: Pause/unpause the game
R: Return to the start screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. This test validates that the player can navigate through the environment, interact with objects, and that the core mechanics function correctly without causing errors.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move randomly through the environment, periodically attempt to interact with objects, and explore different zones. Test both walking and running speeds. Ensure collision detection works properly.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player successfully moves through zones, interacts with at least one object, and the game remains stable without errors. The test is successful if the player can explore for at least 300 frames without crashes.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing - optimal puzzle solving strategy. This test implements an intelligent approach to solve puzzles in the correct sequence and reach one of the winning endings by opening the final door.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate systematically to key puzzle locations, interact with objects in the correct order to collect keys and unlock areas. Prioritize finding the red key, then blue key, solve the machinery puzzle, and finally open the small door to escape.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully solve all required puzzles, collect necessary keys, unlock the final door, and achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. The test succeeds when the player reaches any of the winning endings within 2000 frames.

TEST_3.test_description: Exhaustive exploration testing. This test ensures all zones are accessible and that the player can discover multiple secrets and narrative fragments scattered throughout the dreamscape.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Systematically visit every zone in the game world, interact with all discoverable objects, and collect all narrative fragments. Map out the entire game world to ensure no areas are inaccessible.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Visit all 5+ zones, interact with at least 80% of available objects, and collect multiple narrative fragments. Test succeeds when exploration coverage exceeds 90% within 1500 frames.
